stylePrompt: Create a completely original lighting product inspired by contemporary Cream Style interiors. Express softness, emotional comfort, low-saturation warmth, and tactile refinement through rounded proportions, seamless transitions, and gentle diffused light. The lamp should feel delicate and healing without becoming childish, sugary, or visually weak. Translate creamy interiors into a premium, manufacturable product with a calm silhouette, soft-touch materials, and subtle architectural curves.
specificElements: A continuous arch flowing into the lamp stem
A pebble-like diffuser with no sharp transition
A rounded base inspired by upholstered furniture
metalTranslationPrompt: Create warm cream-style metal forms using rounded spun-aluminum shades, soft inflated-looking sheet-metal volumes, large radii, seamless joints, ivory or milk-white powder coating, and gentle low-contrast curves. Avoid industrial harshness.
